Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Volim kako zvuci uzdah mog imena, s tvojih toplih usana,
Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Kad mi tiho kazes sta da ti radim ja,
Benzin preko plamena.

Sa tobom sve je rulet, od milke do nule,
Brze nego Tesla S, ej
Tako ti je sa princezama, voli kad je vezana,
Pssst, Samo niko da ne cuje.

Ele ele ele ele
Ko bi reko da je mala ziva vatra.
Ele ele
Njene misli koje skriva nocu gresnije od pakla.

Subota uvece, susi, Buddha bar,
Leti ide se na Rodos,
Zivi zivot mala kao da je superstar,
Mamin i tatin je ponos.

Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Volim kako zvuci uzdah mog imena, s tvojih toplih usana,
Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Kad mi tiho kazes sta da ti radim ja,
Benzin preko plamena.

Mala moze casove da daje,
Kada igra opasna je,
I svi kazu aj jaj jaj jaj,

Nocas lepa je ko Raj,
Kukovima uvija,
I svi kazu samo aj jaj jaj

snippet.title: BEZ USTRUؤŒAVANJA - Boإ¾o Preleviؤ‡: U toku je obraؤچun izmeؤ‘u Aleksandra Vuؤچiؤ‡a i Nebojإ،e Stefanoviؤ‡a!
snippet.description:
Gost emisije â€œBez ustruؤچavanjaâ€‌ bio je advokat i nekadaإ،nji ministar MUP-a, Boإ¾o Preleviؤ‡ koji je komentarisao hapإ،enje kriminalne grupe Veljka Belivuka i ukazao na dogaؤ‘aje prethodinih godina koji su ovu grupu povezivali sa aktuelnom vlaإ،ؤ‡u. Da li je poreؤ‘enje ovog klana sa Zemunskim opravdano i zbog ؤچega se toliko dugo ؤچekalo na njihovo hapإ،enje, إ،ta nam govori vreme njihovog liإ،avanja slobode, zbog ؤچega su snimci sa mesta zloؤچina procureli u javnost i objavljivani u tabloidima i na televizijama, po reؤچima Boإ¾e Preleviؤ‡a, to govori o uniإ،tavanju i kriminalizovanju institucija. Kako komentariإ،e ostavke sekretara Drإ¾avnog veؤ‡a tuإ¾ilaca Tome Zoriؤ‡a, ali i Vladimira Vuletiؤ‡a sa mesta potpredsednika FK â€‌Partzianâ€‌, ali i sasluإ،anje nekadaإ،njeg naؤچelnika Kriminalistiؤچke policije Ilije Milaؤچiؤ‡a, saznaؤ‡ete u emisiji. Preleviؤ‡ je komentarisao i izbor Jasmine Vasoviؤ‡ za predsednicu Vrhovnog Kasacionog suda, ali i Zoru Dobriؤچanin za ؤچlanicu Visokog saveta sudstva i Drإ¾avnog veؤ‡a tuإ¾ilaca i podsetio da je ona branilac okrivljenih u aferi â€œJovanjicaâ€‌. Preleviؤ‡ smatra da ؤ‡e zbog kriminalnih klanova reagovati i Evropa, jer prevazilaze okvire naإ،e zemlje, u emisiji ؤ‡ete takoؤ‘e moؤ‡i da saznate zbog ؤچega smatra da nam je Francuska podrإ،ka ka Evropskoj Uniji, ali i zbog ؤچega je skeptik kada se govori o ubrzanom procesu ka prikljuؤچivanju i otvaranju novih klastera. Hoؤ‡e li se opozicija ujediniti, إ،ta oؤچekuje od pregovora izmeؤ‘u vlasti i opozicije, zbog ؤچega je pomoؤ‡ iz Evrope u pregovaranju neophodna i koja je uloga Skupإ،tine slobodne Srbije, vidi li إ،ansu opozicije na narednim izborima, samo su neka od pitanja o aktuelnim politiؤچkim temama na koje je dao odgovor. Gost je ؤچestitao predsedniku Srbije Aleksandru Vuؤچiؤ‡u na vakcinaciji stanovniإ،tva, ali i izrazio zabrinutost zbog izuzetka empatije kod naإ،ih graؤ‘ana zbog broja preminulih lekara usled pandemije i sa druge strane, kako kaإ¾e veؤ‡ skoro godinu dana neometanog organizovanja kovid zabava.

snippet.title: IK1 Sta sam tebi & ko sam sebi | Andjelka Prpic
snippet.description:
Jedna od nasih najpopularnijih glumica, Andjelka Prpic na stolici preko puta Ivana Stankovica.

Dobrodoإ،li na zvaniؤچni YouTube kanal K1 TV-a!
â†“ â†“ â†“ Posetite naإ، sajt i naloge na druإ،tvenim mreإ¾ama:
K1TV WEB: https://bit.ly/K1TVsajt
K1TV Program: https://bit.ly/K1TVprogram
âœ” FACEBOOK: https://bit.ly/K1TVFacebook 
ًں“· INSTAGRAM: https://bit.ly/K1TVInstagram
â‌¥ YOUTUBE: https://bit.ly/K1TVYouTube

Razonodite se uz muziؤچko-zabavni sadrإ¾aj domaؤ‡e produkcije najviإ،eg standarda, kao i premijerno prikazivanje najpopularnijih stranih TV formata.
Iz naإ،e produkcije izdvajamo sledeؤ‡e emisije:

"JOJO"
Dve devojke iz grada koje su navikle na modu, izlaske, moderne tehnologije i glamur pokuإ،avaju da upoznaju manje urbane delove Srbije i da ih zavole.
Uskoro:

"إ ta sam sebi, ko sam tebi"
Voditelj, Ivan Stankoviؤ‡, marketing guru, vodi intervju sa popularnim autorima u studiju, pred publikom. Gost â€œjedan na jedanâ€‌ razgovara sa voditeljem o svemu, â€œna iglamaâ€‌ zbog voditelja i prisutne publike.
LINK: https://bit.ly/StaSamSebiIkoSamSebi

"Top Lista"
Drugaؤچija od drugih, Iva, vodi vas u svet aktuelne svetske i domaؤ‡e muziؤچke scene. Saznaؤ‡ete إ،ta drugi sluإ،aju, ko je i zbog ؤچega na vrhu top lista. Uz to, otkriؤ‡ete
zanimljive detalje iz privatnog إ¾ivota izvoؤ‘aؤچa sa top liste.

"Generalka"
Koje javne liؤچnosti su radile intervencije na licu i telu? Kako su izgledale pre, a kako posle njih i da li one to kriju ili otvoreno o tome priؤچaju? Kroz ove zanimljive razgovore vode vas Milica Leإ،iؤ‡ i Ljubomir Dorontiؤ‡.

snippet.title: Na veؤچeri kod: Tijana Dapؤچeviؤ‡ / sezona 2 / ep2
snippet.description:
U sledeؤ‡oj epizodi serijala "Na veؤچeri kod" videؤ‡ete kako se u ulozi domaؤ‡ice snaإ،la prva predstavnica Biber ekipe, إ،armantna Tijana Dapؤچeviؤ‡.
Njene srpsko-makedonske specijalitete ocenjivaؤ‡e Ana Staniؤ‡, Ivana Peters, Aleksandra Bursaؤ‡, Milan Gromiliؤ‡, Bojan Vaskoviؤ‡ i proإ،lonedeljni domaؤ‡in Ivan Mihailoviؤ‡.

Saznaؤ‡ete za koju je pesmu Tijana dobila najveؤ‡i bakإ،iإ، u إ¾ivotu i to baإ، od sopstvenog muإ¾a sa kojim je poؤچela da إ¾ivi dan-dva nakon upoznavanja. ؤŒuؤ‡ete kako ona sama sebe zove i إ،ta o tome misli njena najbolja drugarica i imenjakinja Tijana.
Tijana otkriva da njeno violonؤچelo ima ime, ali i zaإ،to nije postala pijanista ili violinista i zaإ،to je "privilegija" kada ni jedan jedini dan ne mora da ide na posao.

Njeni gosti pokazali su se kao duhoviti, jeإ،ni i raspevani, a u tome su posebno prednjaؤچili Ivana i Bojan koji je svojim saborcima otkrio i إ،ta znaؤچi "kovrdإ¾avo pevanje", ali je i sama domaؤ‡ica u viإ،e navrata potvrdila svoj dobar glas.

snippet.title: MEDICO - Mamma Mia (prod. by EnelBeatz)
snippet.description:
INSTAGRAM PROFILI:
Medico : https://www.instagram.com/whoismedico/

Music: Medico
Text: Medico
Arrangement: EnelBeatz
Back vocal: Maإ،a Sitarica
Mix & Master: Arpino Sachi


Video production: Vedad Mandra | xvedmanx
Directed by: Medico, Vedad Mandra
Script: Vedad Mandra, Medico
Camera: Vedad Mandra
CC VFX Post: Vedad Mandra
Costume: Emina Tsili

TEXT

bridge:
o mama mia mama
ko zmija zlu tom prija
uvijek zijan karma
sve vrti se sve dharma 
mama mia

ref.
i ja toga svjestan sam necastan cin mi je
jastuk na nju mirise polijem viskijem x2


vers1
moje sve htjele bi bit
 jer na meni samo je lagerfeld karl e 
zelja joj htjela benz
 nije ni bitno ko sjedi sa strane

moli da voli brzo da boli
moli za gole sate
prolij pa dolij 
glumi mi dolly dobro ta zna sta radi

meni ti nisi stipsa
jasno vidno je da tvoj tip sam
svaki drugi il treci ti kiksa
sto bas ja da sam tvoj schicksal

takvih meni puna je lista
sklonim te ko potezom kista
u minuti raste mi ista
samo za noc dobra za vise nista

bridge:
o mama mia mama
ko zmija zlu tom prija
uvijek zijan karma
sve vrati se sve dharma 
mama mia

 ref.
i ja toga svjestan sam necastan cin mi je
jastuk na nju mirise polijem viskijem x3


vers 2.
da li mislis na mene ko prije
prisjetis se probije ko noz
navijas ti za mene i lijek
tvoj sam jedini ja antidot

znas ti moje namjere ne nisu namjerne
ali vuce me na zlo
velike su razmjere izmedju zavjere
razlika je nebo tlo

meni ti nisi stipsa
jasno vidno je da tvoj tip sam
svaki drugil treci ti kiksa
sto bas ja da sam tvoj schicksal
takvih meni puna je lista
sklonim te ko potezom kista
u minuti raste mi ista
samo za noc dobra za vise nista

snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman Kؤ±rؤ±mlؤ± is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherâ€™s death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewâ€¦ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleâ€™s arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kؤ±rؤ±mlؤ± family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kؤ±rؤ±mlؤ± mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts.

snippet.title: Meghan Markle Says Kate Middleton Made Her Cry Before Wedding
snippet.description: Meghan Markle is setting the record straight. The former â€œSuitsâ€‌ star spoke with Oprah Winfrey during a bombshell tell-all on CBS, where she addressed a past rumor that she made Kate Middleton cry prior to her wedding to Prince Harry. She said the situation was actually the opposite, and that it was actually Kate who made her cry and that her sister-in-law ended up apologizing.

snippet.title: Vladika Porfirije pjeva ؤچetniؤچke pjesme
snippet.description:
Novi patrijarh SPC-a Porfirije, do danas mitropolit zagrebaؤچko-ljubljanski osvanuo je prije pet godina na video snimku, kako u zanimljivom druإ،tvu pjeva ؤچetniؤچku pjesmu posveؤ‡enu ؤچetniؤچkom vojvodi Momؤچilu ؤگujiؤ‡u, ratnom zloؤچincu iz Drugog svjetskog rata.

Snimak je navodno nastao prije pet godina u Chicagu.

- Nakon liturgije bio je ruؤچak i zabava, rekao sam Voji Bilbiji da otpjeva "naإ،u pjesmu", misleؤ‡i na "Tamo daleko". On je poؤچeo pjevati pjesmu koju i ne znam i nekako sam pjevuإ،io za njima, malo iznenaؤ‘en إ،to nije zapjevao onu koju sam mislio, pa sam u jednom trenutku i zaإ،utio - pravdao se Porfirije u hrvatskim medijima rekavإ،i da je zaإ،utio kada se pjevalo o "kokardi vojvode ؤگujiؤ‡a".

Iz snimke se jasno vidi da je Periؤ‡ velik dio pjesme zaista opjevao, a veؤ‡ od poؤچetka same pjesme jasno je da se radi o pjesmi ratne tematike s obzirom da se spominju "mitraljesci" i "granate".

- إ ta se ono na Dinari sjaji, ؤگujiؤ‡eva kokarda na glavi - kaإ¾e sporni stih, a teإ،ko je procijeniti je li Porfirije zaista, kako tvrdi, prestao pjevati.

Pop Momؤچilo ؤگujiؤ‡ ؤچetniؤچki je vojvoda i ratni zloؤچinac odgovoran za neke od najgnusnijih zloؤچina na ovim podruؤچjima u Drugom svjetskom ratu. ؤگujiؤ‡evi ؤچetnici jedan od najveؤ‡ih pokolja napravili su u selu Gata u zaleؤ‘u Omiإ،a kada su 1.oktobra 1942. godine zvjerski poklali 95 civila.

Nama ostaje glavno pitanje zaإ،to je Nebojإ،a Stefanoviؤ‡ baإ، sada i u ovom trenutku stavljen na odstrel i zaإ،to se u stvari zamerio Vuؤچiؤ‡u. Svi u reإ¾imu su svesni da bi takav potez bio poؤچetak kraja ovog reإ¾ima, obraؤچunavanje sa Stefanoviؤ‡em ne moإ¾e da proؤ‘e bezbolno u ovom trenutku", kaإ¾e.

snippet.title: Perseverance Roverâ€™s Descent and Touchdown on Mars (Official NASA Video)
snippet.description:
NASA's Mars 2020 Perseverance mission captured thrilling footage of its rover landing in Mars' Jezero Crater on Feb. 18, 2021.  The real footage in this video was captured by several cameras that are part of the rover's entry, descent, and landing suite. The views include a camera looking down from the spacecraft's descent stage (a kind of rocket-powered jet pack that helps fly the rover to its landing site), a camera on the rover looking up at the descent stage, a camera on the top of the aeroshell (a capsule protecting the rover) looking up at that parachute, and a camera on the bottom of the rover looking down at the Martian surface.
 
The audio embedded in the video comes from the mission control call-outs during entry, descent, and landing. 
 
For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance
 
Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

snippet.title: Watch NASAâ€™s Perseverance Rover Land on Mars!
snippet.description:
Watch an epic journey unfold on Thursday, Feb. 18 as our Perseverance rover lands on Mars. To reach the surface of the Red Planet, the rover has to survive the harrowing final phase known as Entry, Descent, and Landing.
 
Only then can the rover â€“ the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space â€“ search Jezero Crater for signs of ancient life and collect samples that will eventually be returned to Earth.
 
Tune in to a live video feed of key landing activities and commentary from Mission Control at NASAâ€™s Jet Propulsion Laboratory.

Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman Kؤ±rؤ±mlؤ± is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherâ€™s death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewâ€¦ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleâ€™s arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kؤ±rؤ±mlؤ± family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kؤ±rؤ±mlؤ± mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts.

When Mr Hikmet is given a terminal diagnosis he wonders what will become of the fortune he has worked so hard to amass - he can't leave everything to his frivolous son Emir. snippet.title: Starship | SN10 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
As early as Wednesday, March 3, the SpaceX team will attempt a high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 10 (SN10) â€“ our third high-altitude suborbital flight test of a Starship prototype from SpaceXâ€™s site in Cameron County, Texas. Similar to the high-altitude flight tests of Starship SN8 and SN9, SN10 will be powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee â€“ approximately 10 km in altitude. SN10 will perform a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.
  
The Starship prototype will descend under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps are actuated by an onboard flight computer to control Starshipâ€™s attitude during flight and enable precise landing at the intended location. SN10â€™s Raptor engines will then reignite as the vehicle attempts a landing flip maneuver immediately before touching down on the landing pad adjacent to the launch mount. 

A controlled aerodynamic descent with body flaps and vertical landing capability, combined with in-space refilling, are critical to landing Starship at destinations across the solar system where prepared surfaces or runways do not exist, and returning to Earth. This capability will enable a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration, interplanetary flights and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.  

Given the dynamic schedule of development testing, stay tuned to our social media channels for updates as we move toward SpaceXâ€™s third high-altitude flight test of Starship!

snippet.title: See Mars Like Never Before! NASA's Perseverance Rover Sends New Video and Images of the Red Planet
snippet.description: NASAâ€™s Perseverance Mars Rover safely touched down on the Red Planet on Feb. 18. So what will the robotic scientist "see" on her descent and what will she do next? Join mission experts for update about the rover â€“ the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space â€“ including imagery it captured and its mission to explore Mars.

snippet.title: Game Recap: Nuggets 128, Bucks 97
snippet.description: Nikola Jokic recorded the 50th triple-double of his career as he tallied 37 points, 10 rebounds and 11 assists for the Nuggets as they defeated the Bucks, 128-97. Giannis Antetokounmpo recorded 27 points, eight rebounds and three assists for the Bucks in the losing effort. The Nuggets improve to 20-15 on the season, while the Bucks fall to 21-14.

snippet.title: The Nuggets might need to give up Jamal Murray to keep Nikola Jokic happy - Paul Pierce | The Jump
snippet.description:
Paul Pierce and Richard Jefferson join Rachel Nichols on The Jump to play "Panic or Patience?" for the Miami Heat, Toronto Raptors and the Denver Nuggets. 
0:00 Panic or Patience? for the Miami Heat
2:05 Jefferson says the Toronto Raptors need to give up assets moving forward.
4:32 Pierce says the Denver Nuggets should panic.
4:53 Pierce believes the Nuggets might need to give up Jamal Murray to get back into the top 4 in the Western conference and keep Nikola Jokic happy.

When Mr Hikmet is given a terminal diagnosis he wonders what will become of the fortune he has worked so hard to amass - he can't leave everything to his frivolous son Emir. He travels to see Reyhan, the daughter of an old family friend. She is a kind and caring girl and Hikmet has her promise to marry Emir, securing a stable future for the family. But Emir makes his own promise - to punish his father for controlling his life he will treat Reyhan so badly that she is forced to leave him.

#Yemin
#ThePromise

snippet.title: MIC-MC-GOD MODE (OFFICIAL AUDIO)
snippet.description:
MIC-MC : https://www.instagram.com/micmc_93/

TEKST:

Koliko svez brate
vi morate da vezbate
jer repovati ne znate
sve znate,face su vam bez brate
sta je to u trendingu mora da me zezate
predahnem 

Ne mogu vise da gledam ova sranja,dranja,pomilovanja
imam nocne more sanjam

celija mozdana mi manja kazu mi da sam bog
bolje bi bilo bogu da se klanjas 

ne mogu stati ja dok ne dodje do klanja
jebeno lud evo mentalnog mi stanja 
eto me svud samo ganjam
vidi mi trud vidi kralja 
hejtere udarim preko glave poput thorovoga malja 

brate udarim kako valja,neko mi tamo obraz kalja 
habada babada babada babada govore glupi ljudi puni znanja
koliko repera trebam da pokidam da bi razumeli da sam budala
voli me svaki blok kraj stek voli me svaka mahala 
reperi za mene su sala meni je mikrofon taj alat
bolje mi bezi bre pedala,hteo bi feat neka hvala  
ne mogu tik tok repere,hip hop trepere para
ne mogu da mi plate pa se zapale izgore ko cigara
stivena sigala glume ala nemaju signala 
ponela ih slava dali za to deo svog anala
u Srbiji sam tata,kralj bog,eminem pa alah 
tako govore ljudi za mene pa mi previsoka skala 
ovo je odvod,prati moj hod UFO moj brod
ljudi su govna neki su manji govnima su pod rod
ja sam pro pro nisam propo moj kod 
10 dina ovde sada uso sam u GOD MOde


Malo mi treba da napadnem likove
moji mi govore ne veruj nikome 
pojedem barove snerove bitove 
ne moze niko da ponovi i to me 
zele kopirati praviti hitove
da li je moguce neko da skine me 
picke mekane face im vilene
oni bi hteli dole da vide me 

ne mogu dole da budem ja gorim 
i gorivo tera me jako da lomi
i repere volim kad leze u komi
a lirika zube im polomi boli 
ti bogovi pitaju kako postojim
i rogovi rastu mi sebe se bojim
jebe se meni da pobede brojim
propali ovi tu reperi tvoji

Za 10 godina nisam postigo ono sto ti si 

zabole me ono sto mi visi 

razlika izmedju mene i tebe 
kad ja repovo sam ti si tati u testisu bio samo orhitis-guglaj

U prevodu bio si bol u mudima
svako se pita na sta tacno ja aludiram 
ovo skola je za sve a oni mi uzina 
radis playback to ti je kao sebi da aplaudiras 
boii

Vidim dredove te furas glumac
nisi lil pump mozda mala pumpica za kurac
dm rejpujes mi nisam do sad video te buraz 
ni spomenuo pa ne znam zasto se tu guras

hoces clout vidim da si nula 
jebo mir hocu rat evo kozna frula
posto vidim bas si zapeo da duvas 
takve jebem vec odavno nemoj tu da mi se kurvas

snippet.title: Plazma torta sa milka ؤچokoladom, pojela se odmah pa sam ponovo pravila da bih vam uslikala presek.
snippet.description:
Nisam se nadala da ؤ‡e u roku od pola sata ,,nestati"ove torte i da ؤ‡u ostati bez preseka i slike (a bez toga vam ne mogu pustiti recept)..tako da sam je opet pravila, إ،to je mojima savrإ،eno odgovaralo :)
Torta sa plazma keksom, milka ؤچokoladom i leإ،nicima. Odmah se pojela bez obzira إ،to spada u one torte kojih je dovoljno jedno parؤچe. Korice su lagane od belanaca (nisu suإ،ene) i plazma keksa.
#milkatorta #plazmatorta #roؤ‘endansketorte
sveؤچane torte
torte sa korama
Recepte moإ¾ete ؤچitati na blogu: http://www.serpica.net/2021/02/plazma-torta-sa-milka-cokoladom.html


Sastojci i priprema:
Kora:

- 5 belanaca
- 5 kaإ،ika إ،eؤ‡era
- 1,5 kaإ،ika braإ،na
- 5 kaإ،ika mlevene plazme

3 - 4 kaإ،ike vode ili mleka za prelivanje peؤچenih kora

Prave se ovakve 3 kore.

Umutiti belanca i إ،eؤ‡er u ؤچvrst sneg. Umeإ،ati braإ،no i plazmu. Peؤ‡i u zagrejanoj rerni na 180 stepeni do 20 minuta. Peؤچene kore premazati vodom ili mlekom, 3-4 kaإ،ike je dovoljno.

Fil:

- 15 إ¾umanaca
- 150 gr. إ،eؤ‡era
- 200 gr. maslaca ili margarina
- 100 gr. crne milka ؤچokolade
- 100 gr. bele milka ؤچokolade
- 200 gr. mlevene plazme
- 100 gr. mlevenih leإ،nika (lepإ،e ako su predhodno peؤچeni)
- 300 ml. slatke pavlake

Umutiti إ¾umanca sa إ،eؤ‡erom i kuvati na pari uz neprestano meإ،anje, oko 10 minuta.
Ostaviti da se ohladi. Za to vreme rastopiti ؤچokolade, umutiti maslac i slatku pavlaku.
U fil mikserom umeإ،ati maslac i ؤچetiri pune kaإ،ike slatke pavlake.
Umeإ،ati leإ،nike i plazma keks. Podeliti fil na dva dela, u jedna deo staviti rastopljenu tamnu ؤچokoladu u drugi deo rastopljenu belu ؤچokoladu.

Na tacnu staviti kalup i u njemu filovati tortu.
Kora, tamniji fil, slatka pavlaka, kora, svetliji fil, slatka pavlaka, kora. Odozgo izmeإ،ati ostatake filova, uvek ostavim kaإ،iku-dve fila i malo slatke pavlake. To mi bude fil s kojim premaإ¾em treؤ‡u koru. 
Moإ¾ete ukrasiti إ،lagom ili rastopljenom ؤچokoladom.
Torta mora da odstoji jedna dan u friإ¾ideru pa tek onda seؤ‡i i posluإ¾iti.
Prijatno!

en.title: Cake with milk chocolate and ground biscuits, the best cake ever!
en.description:
#cake #chocolate #recipes
Ingredients and preparation:

Biscuit:
- 5 egg whites
- 5 tablespoons of sugar
- 1.5 tablespoons of flour
- 5 tablespoons ground biscuits

3-4 tablespoons of water or milk for topping baked biscuits

Prepare three biscuits.

Whisk egg whites and sugar. Stir in flour and ground biscuits. Bake in a preheated oven at 180 degrees for up to 20 minutes. Coat the baked biscuits with water or milk, 3-4 tablespoons is enough.

Cream:

- 15 egg yolks
- 150 gr. sugar
- 200 gr. butter or margarine
- 100 gr. dark milka chocolate
- 100 gr. white milk chocolate
- 200 gr. ground biscuits
- 100 gr. hazelnuts (better if pre-baked)
- 300 ml. whipped cream

Whisk the egg yolks with the sugar and cook on a steamer with a constant question, about 10 minutes.
Allow to cool. Meanwhile, melt the chocolate, whisk the butter. Whip the whipped cream.
Add 4 tablespoons of whipped cream to the filling, whisk.
Stir in hazelnuts and biscuits. Divide the filling into two parts, put melted dark chocolate in one part and melted white chocolate in the other part.

Fill the cake.
Biscuit, darker filling, whipped cream, biscuit, lighter filling, whipped cream, crust. Mix the rest of the fillings on top, I always leave a spoonful or two of filling and a little sweet sour cream. This is my filling with which I coat the third biscuit.
You can decorate with whipped cream or melted chocolate.
The cake must stand for one day in the refrigerator, cut and serve.
Enjoy !

snippet.title: An Afternoon with Prince Harry & James Corden
snippet.description:
Now that the Duke and Duchess of Sussex are settled into Southern California, James Corden thought it was time to show his friend Prince Harry the sights. From tea on an open top bus to visiting the "Fresh Prince of Bel Air" mansion, Prince Harry gets the tour he never dreamed of. Special thanks to Spartan for providing an incredible Spartan Race Obstacle Course to run. Learn more: spartan.com

More Late Late Show:

Instagram: http://bit.ly/latelategram

Watch The Late Late Show with James Corden weeknights at 12:35 AM ET/11:35 PM CT. Only on CBS.

Get new episodes of shows you love across devices the next day, stream live TV, and watch full seasons of CBS fan favorites anytime, anywhere with CBS All Access. Try it free! http://bit.ly/1OQA29B

---
Each week night, THE LATE LATE SHOW with JAMES CORDEN throws the ultimate late night after party with a mix of celebrity guests, edgy musical acts, games and sketches. Corden differentiates his show by offering viewers a peek behind-the-scenes into the green room, bringing all of his guests out at once and lending his musical and acting talents to various sketches. Additionally, bandleader Reggie Watts and the house band provide original, improvised music throughout the show. Since Corden took the reigns as host in March 2015, he has quickly become known for generating buzzworthy viral videos, such as Carpool Karaoke."

- Mi smo u diktaturi jednoga ؤچoveka koji je izgubio svaku pamet i razum. On je uhapsio kriminalnu grupa za koju je postojala opravdana sumnja da je izvrإ،ila teإ،ka kriviؤچna grupa i ؤچiji je ؤچlan bio i sam njegov sin kojeg je evakuisao u Kostariku; a sve je to uradio i da se graؤ‘ani Srbije ne bi bavili pravim problemima kao إ،to je poskupljenje struje, nestaإ،ice hrane, nezaposlenost i sliؤچno.

Vuؤچiؤ‡ nije ؤچovek koji ima ovlaإ،ؤ‡enja da vodi sudske istrage, on samo moإ¾e biti u pisanoj formi obaveإ،ten o njihovom toku, ali ne i o svim detaljima jer takve istrage vodi Tuإ¾ilaإ،tvo za organizovani kriminal. 

Takoؤ‘e, policija ima prava samo da privede lice koje je zatekla u izvrإ،enju  kriviؤچnog dela. Lice se poziva na razgovor u policiju, a privodi se po nalogu tuإ¾ioca koji ga sasluإ،ava. To su dva razliؤچita pravna stanja. Znaؤچi, Kokeza je mogao biti pozvan na razgovor u policiji u svojstvu graؤ‘anina i da da izjavu; ili ispitivan u svojstvu osumnjiؤچenog i da ima pravo na advokata, a njemu tada moإ¾e odrediti zadrإ¾avanje samo tuإ¾ioc koji pokreؤ‡e postupak, za Srbin.info rekao je u telefonskom razgovoru glavni odgovorni urednik magazina â€‍Tabloidâ€‌, Milovan Brkiؤ‡, komentariإ،uؤ‡i danaإ،nje, u nedelju 28. februara, privoؤ‘enje na informativni razgovor u policijsku stanicu prvog ؤچoveka Fudbalskog saveza Srbije (FSS), Slaviإ،e Kokeza.

- Pitanje tipa - da li je nameravao da smakne Vuؤچiؤ‡a - su pitanja koja pokazuju إ،izofrenost onih koji ih postavljaju jer je normalno oؤچekivati da niko إ¾iv ne bi rekao da je uؤچestvovao u takvim aktivnostima. Pogotovo ne ؤچovek tipa Slaviإ،e Kokeze. To ne znaؤچi da ja ovde branim Slaviإ،u Kokezu kao predsednika FSS i Vuؤچiؤ‡evog prijatelja i biznismena, veؤ‡ govorim o graؤ‘aninu Kokezi koji ima pravo i da odbije poligraf, pogotovo kada imamo na umu da je  do skora glavni poligrafista bila Dijana Hrkaloviؤ‡ kod koje je na poligrafu proإ،ao i Aleksandar Vuؤچiؤ‡ kada su ga pitali koliko je bogat, podsetio je Brkiؤ‡.

A إ،ta je u vezi svega spomenutog rekao glavni odgovorni urednik magazina â€‍Tabloidâ€‌ posluإ،ajte u video prilogu iznad, pa o svemu donesite svoj valjani sud.
